summary: The real shipped dispatch runs in a real sh: 'dispatch_harness_auth outfitter || echo unsupported' must yield exactly the notice + pi-auth-flow (len==2, so 'unsupported' cannot appear) across new/existing credential paths, and the error-path test asserts 'unsupported' absent even when the profile dir cannot be created; only the downstream setup_pi_auth is stubbed, not the dispatch under test.
